channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 0e91b552-ae32-49ea-9898-317af306aa4b
Display name: Genome EndUser
Description: Full access to Genome data plane operations only
Link: https://management.azure.com/0e91b552-ae32-49ea-9898-317af306aa4b?api-version=2022-04-01
